tags.name: Stack
tags.description: The Stack block is OmniJS's layout container. By default, it compiles to `<main>`, `<section>`, or `<div>` depending on its nesting depth. Can be overriden using the `as` attribute.

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Force the Stack block to render as a specific HTML tag (e.g., `<Stack as="nav">` renders as a `<nav>` element).

attributes.name: route
attributes.description: Declares client-side route path. The Stack will render only when the URL pathname matches this value.

tags.name: Text
tags.description:
The Text block handles typography and text content. By default, it compiles to header tags `

` through `

` based on hierarchy, and `

` for body text. Can be overriden using the `as` attribute.

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Force the Text block to render as a specific HTML tag (e.g., `<Text as="span">` renders as a `<span>` element).

attributes.name: bind::text
attributes.description: One-way bind a reactive state signal to the text content of this element (e.g., `bind::text="?count"`).

tags.name: Action
tags.description: The Action block handles all user-interactive elements. By default, it compiles to `<button>`, `<a>`, or `<input>` depending on its attributes. Can be overriden using the `as` attribute.

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Force the Action block to render as a specific HTML tag (e.g., `<Action as="div">` renders as a `<div>` element).

attributes.name: navigate::to
attributes.description: Triggers client-side SPA navigation to the specified route (e.g., `navigate::to="/about"`).

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Standard external anchor link. Automatically compiles the block into an `<a>` tag.

attributes.name: on::click
attributes.description: Attach a click event handler function defined in the `<script>` block (e.g., `on::click="increment"`).

attributes.name: bind::value
attributes.description: Two-way bind a reactive state signal to the input value of the element (e.g., `bind::value="?username"`).

tags.name: Collection
tags.description: The Collection block is used for list rendering, tables, and data iteration. By default, it compiles to `<ul>`, `<ol>`, or `<table>` depending on its attributes. Can be overriden using the `as` attribute.

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Force the Collection block to render as a specific HTML tag.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Sets the semantic element type (e.g., `type="table"`, `type="thead"`, `type="tbody"`, `type="tr"`, `type="ol"`, or default `type="ul"`).

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: Reference to a reactive array state signal to iterate over (e.g., `data="?items"`).

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Defines the variable name for the current item in the iteration scope (e.g., `as="item"`).

tags.name: Media
tags.description: The Media block renders rich media. Compiles to ``, `

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Force the Media block to render as a specific HTML tag.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL path to the media resource.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Explicitly override the media element type (e.g., `type="video"`, `type="audio"`, `type="iframe"`, `type="image"`).

tags.name: Form
tags.description: The Form block encapsulates input forms and controls. Compiles to `<form>`, `<input>`, `<textarea>`, `<select>`, or `<label>`.

attributes.name: as
attributes.description: Force the Form block to render as a specific HTML tag.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of form input control (e.g., `type="textarea"`, `type="select"`, `type="label"`, `type="email"`, etc.).

attributes.name: bind::value
attributes.description: Two-way bind a reactive state signal to the input control's value.

tags.name: Use
tags.description: Import an external component file and register it under a custom tag name.

attributes.name: component
attributes.description: Relative URL path to the target `.omni` component file.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Strict custom element tag name to register this component as (e.g., `name="Header"` will register `<Header>`).

tags.name: Portal
tags.description: Renders its children into a target DOM node outside the parent component's DOM tree (e.g. #modal-root or body) while preserving reactive state bindings and visibility.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: CSS selector of the external target DOM element to mount the portal contents into (e.g. target="#modal-root", target="body").
